nasb.text: So the name of that place was called Kibroth-hattaavah, because there they buried the people who had been greedy.

esv.text: Therefore the name of that place was called Kibroth-hattaavah, because there they buried the people who had the craving.

cnv.text: 於是那地方名叫基博羅．哈他瓦，因為他們在那裡埋葬起了貪慾的人。

ccb.text: 因此，那地方叫基博罗·哈他瓦，因为那些贪食者埋葬在那里。
